title: eucalyptus subangusta subsp. pusilla
intro: Eucalyptus subangusta subsp. pusilla is a small shrub species within the eucalyptus plant family, native to Western Australia. The leaves of this plant are known for their medicinal properties, containing eucalyptol, a compound with decongestant and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eucalyptus subangusta subsp. pusilla include relief from respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs, as well as potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Eucalyptus subangusta subsp. pusilla can be prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy or applied topically, or made into teas and infusions for oral consumption.
